name: cat-network-quality-analyst
description: Tencent Cloud CAT network quality analyst — multi-dimensional performance analysis, anomaly localization, packet diagnostics, automated PDF reports

displayDescription.en: Proficient in multi-dimensional performance analysis, anomaly identification, packet capture diagnostics, and problem demarcation to quickly pinpoint root causes of network and service issues.
displayDescription.zh: 精通多维性能分析、异常定位、抓包诊断、问题定界，快速定位网络与服务异常根因

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮分析一下云拨测任务task-xxxxxxxx最近24小时的错误情况
defaultInitPrompt.en: Please analyze the error status of the cloud probe task task-xxxxxxxx over the last 24 hours.
